metadata.title: Free Bedtime Story Generator - Short Bedtime Stories for Kids in Minutes
metadata.description: Generate short bedtime stories for kids in seconds. Create personalized 5 minute bedtime stories by age and theme. Quick bedtime stories, free and unlimited.
metadata.keywords: bedtime story generator, bedtime stories for kids, short bedtime stories, 5 minute bedtime stories, quick bedtime stories, AI bedtime story, kids bedtime story, children's story generator, free bedtime story

ui.title: Bedtime Story Generator
ui.subtitle: Personalized bedtime stories for kids, ready to read aloud in 5 minutes.

placeholders.story_idea: What should the story be about? (e.g. 'A small bunny who is afraid of the dark finds a glowing firefly friend')

validation.enter_story_idea: Please enter a story idea for the bedtime story.

errors.generation_failed: Failed to generate the story. Please try again.

output.title: Your Bedtime Story
output.empty_message: Your personalized bedtime story will appear here. Cozy up and get ready to read aloud!

random_prompts: A small bunny who is afraid of the dark discovers that fireflies are the stars' tiny helpers
A little cloud who can't rain properly learns to make the most beautiful rainbow instead
A sleepy dinosaur who keeps losing his favorite blanket before bedtime
Two mice who live inside a library and go on adventures through the books at night
A young dragon who accidentally sneezes glitter instead of fire
A baby elephant who is the only one in her herd afraid of water
A friendly moon who comes down to earth one night to see what children dream about
A tiny robot who learns what it means to be a good friend
A bear cub who wants to stay awake to see the first snowflake of winter
A mermaid who wishes she could walk on land and the seahorse who helps her

feature_intro.name: feature_intro
feature_intro.label: Overview
feature_intro.title: What Is a Bedtime Story Generator?
feature_intro.description:
A Bedtime Story Generator creates short bedtime stories for kids, original, age-appropriate tales tailored to your child's needs in seconds. Instead of searching through books or repeating the same stories, describe any scenario, pick a theme, and instantly receive quick bedtime stories ready to read aloud.

Whether you need 5 minute bedtime stories for a busy weeknight or longer adventures for the weekend, every story is crafted specifically for children with vocabulary and plot complexity matched to the age group you select. Personalize with your child's name, embed a gentle moral lesson, and choose a calming or adventurous ending, making bedtime stories for kids something your child actually looks forward to.

feature_benefits.name: feature_benefits
feature_benefits.label: Benefits
feature_benefits.title: Why Use This Bedtime Story Generator
feature_benefits.description: Every story is original, safe, and perfectly tailored for your child.

items.title: Quick Bedtime Stories on Demand
items.description: Need a story fast? Generate quick bedtime stories in seconds, perfect for busy parents who want short bedtime stories without sacrificing quality or warmth.

items.title: Personalized Every Night
items.description: Add your child's name, pick their favorite theme, and choose a moral lesson. The generator creates different bedtime stories for kids every time, so bedtime never feels repetitive.

items.title: Perfect 5 Minute Bedtime Stories
items.description: Choose the Short length option to get 5 minute bedtime stories ideal for winding down. Short enough to hold attention, long enough to help your child drift off to sleep.

how_to_use.name: how_to_use
how_to_use.label: HOW TO USE
how_to_use.title: How to Create Bedtime Stories for Kids in 3 Steps
how_to_use.description: Generate short bedtime stories your child will love, no writing skills needed.

items.title: Describe Your Story Idea
items.description: Type a simple story idea, a character, a problem, or just a scene. Use the Surprise Me button for instant inspiration for tonight's bedtime story.

items.title: Choose Age, Theme & Length
items.description: Select your child's age group and a story theme. Pick Short for quick bedtime stories (3-5 minutes) or Medium for longer adventures. Add a moral lesson and your child's name.

items.title: Generate and Read Aloud
items.description: Click Generate and receive a complete short bedtime story ready to read aloud. Perfect 5 minute bedtime stories for kids who need a calming wind-down routine.

feature_section.name: applications
feature_section.label: Use Cases
feature_section.title: Who Uses This Bedtime Story Generator
feature_section.description: Perfect for parents, grandparents, and educators who need bedtime stories for kids every night.

items.title: Busy Parents
items.description: No time to search for books? Generate quick bedtime stories in seconds. Get a fresh short bedtime story every night without repeating the same tales.

items.title: Grandparents & Caregivers
items.description: Not sure what story to tell? Create warm, personalized bedtime stories for kids in seconds, even if you're not a natural storyteller. Perfect 5 minute bedtime stories for visits.

items.title: Teachers & Educators
items.description: Create short bedtime stories matched to your students' reading level and current lesson theme. Use as classroom read-alouds or take-home stories for families.

faq_section.name: faq
faq_section.label: FAQ
faq_section.title: Bedtime Story Generator FAQs
faq_section.description: Common questions about creating bedtime stories for kids.

items.title: Are the bedtime stories safe for young children?
items.description: Yes. This generator produces child-safe, age-appropriate bedtime stories for kids. The AI avoids any scary, violent, or inappropriate content. All stories are warm, gentle, and positive.

items.title: How long are the short bedtime stories?
items.description: You can choose from three lengths: Short for quick bedtime stories (3-5 min read-aloud), Medium (7-10 min), or Long (12-15 min). The Short option gives you perfect 5 minute bedtime stories for busy nights.

items.title: Can I create 5 minute bedtime stories every night?
items.description: Yes. Select the Short length option and you'll get 5 minute bedtime stories every time. The generator creates a unique story each night, so your child never hears the same one twice.

items.title: Can I add my child's name to the story?
items.description: Yes. Enter your child's name in the optional field and it will be naturally woven into the bedtime story, making the experience feel personal and magical for kids.

items.title: What age groups do the bedtime stories for kids support?
items.description: The generator supports four age groups: Toddlers (2-3), Preschool (4-5), Early Readers (6-8), and Middle Grade (9-12). Each group gets short bedtime stories with vocabulary and complexity matched to that age.

items.title: Is this bedtime story generator free?
items.description: Yes. You can generate quick bedtime stories for free with no account required. Create as many bedtime stories for kids as you need for your nightly routine.

cta_section.description: Generate a quick bedtime story your child will love, short bedtime stories ready in seconds, perfect for a calming 5 minute wind-down.
